sql_query.query: SELECT ws.id, ws.cohort_id AS "cohortId", ws.label, ws.description, ws.step_type AS type, ws.role, ws.position, ws.sla_hours AS "slaHours", ws.active FROM workflow_steps ws JOIN cohorts c ON c.id = ws.cohort_id AND c.organization_id = ws.organization_id JOIN users caller ON caller.id = $1 AND caller.organization_id = $2 AND caller.role = $3 AND caller.role IN ('learner', 'mentor', 'finance', 'admin') AND caller.active = TRUE JOIN organizations o ON o.id = caller.organization_id AND o.active = TRUE WHERE ws.organization_id = caller.organization_id AND c.active = TRUE AND c.id = (SELECT c2.id FROM cohorts c2 WHERE c2.organization_id = caller.organization_id AND c2.active = TRUE ORDER BY c2.start_date DESC, c2.id DESC LIMIT 1) ORDER BY ws.position, ws.id
